@@ -292,6 +292,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-4nzq","title":"bd create --rig flag for cross-rig issue filing","description":"## Problem

To create an issue in a different rig, you must cd to that rig's directory. This is clunky when coordinating across rigs.

## Proposed Solution

Add a --rig flag to bd create that leverages existing routes.jsonl:

```bash
# From anywhere in town
bd create --rig beads --title="bug report" --type=bug

# Equivalent to:
cd ~/gt/beads/mayor/rig && bd create --title="..."
```

## How it works

1. Parse --rig flag (rig name, not prefix)
2. Look up rig in routes.jsonl to find beads location
3. Determine prefix from rig config
4. Create issue in that location with auto-generated ID

## Why elegant

- Leverages existing routing infrastructure
- Rig names are human-memorable (not cryptic prefixes)
- Works from anywhere in town
- Prefix auto-determined from rig config
- Reads naturally: "create in beads"

## Alternative

Also consider --prefix for power users who know prefixes:
```bash
bd create --prefix bd "Title here"
```","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-27T00:39:02.233664-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-27T00:44:04.079867-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-27T00:44:04.079867-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-4oob","title":"bd-hv01: Multi-repo mode not tested with deletion tracking","description":"Problem: Test suite has no coverage for multi-repo mode. ExportToMultiRepo creates multiple JSONL files but snapshot files are hardcoded to single JSONL location.

Impact: Deletion tracking likely silently broken for multi-repo users, could cause data loss.

Fix: Add test and update snapshot logic to handle multiple JSONL files.

Files: cmd/bd/deletion_tracking_test.go, cmd/bd/deletion_tracking.go, cmd/bd/daemon_sync.go:24-34","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-06T18:16:22.965404-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-06T19:36:13.96995-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-06T19:20:50.382822-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-4oob","depends_on_id":"bd-rbxi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-06T18:19:15.014196-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-4opy","title":"Refactor long SQLite test files","description":"The SQLite test files have grown unwieldy. Review and refactor.

## Goals
- Break up large test files into focused modules
- Improve test organization by feature area
- Reduce test duplication
- Make tests easier to maintain and extend

## Areas to Review
- main_test.go (likely the largest)
- Any test files over 500 lines
- Shared test fixtures and helpers
- Test coverage gaps

## Approach
- Group tests by feature (CRUD, sync, queries, transactions)
- Extract common fixtures to test helpers
- Consider table-driven tests where appropriate
- Ensure each test file has clear focus

## Reference
See docs/dev-notes/ for any existing test audit notes","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T23:41:47.025285-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T01:33:25.733299-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T01:33:25.733299-08:00"}
